song.title: Jesus You Are so Beautiful
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord Jesus, You are so beautiful And in Your person peace abides To soothe my soul.|| Oh Jesus, be my light and my love; Though I’m in shadows of the earth, I think only above.
[C] Chorus Lord Jesus, take from me All my empty yearnings. Make me to give to You All my nights and mornings.|| I want a clear sky between us, And a well-lit straight way. Lord guide me every moment today.
[V2] 2) And if my mind from my spirit part, If doubts and fears should hold my heart And control my thoughts;|| Then, Lord, press faith into my heart, Seal me and claim me as Your own; By Your blood I’m bought.
song.author: Johanna I. Busch
